title: Notification No.12/2014-Cus(NT), dated 17.2.2014
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) Notification No. 12/2014-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, 17th February, 2014. S.O. (E).---In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (34) of section 2 of the Customs Act,1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Finance, (Department of Revenue), No. 40/2012-Customs (N.T.), dated the 2nd May, 2012, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), vide number S.O. 993 (E), dated the 2nd May, 2012, namely:- In the said notification, in the TABLE,- (i) against sl. no.2, in column (3), for item (ii), the following item shall be substituted, namely :- "(ii) Section 149 (after grant of order for clearance of goods under section 47 or section 51 of the Customs Act ,1962 as the case may be)." ; (ii) against sl. no. 3, in column (3), after item "(xxxvi)" the following shall be inserted, namely :- "(xxxvii) Section 149 (before grant of order for clearance of goods under section 47 or section 51 of the Customs Act, 1962 as the case may be).". [ F.No. 437/07/2014- Cus IV] ( R.P.Singh) Director (Customs) Note.- The principal notification No. 40/2012-Customs (N.T.), dated the 2nd May, 2012 was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), vide number S.O. 993(E), dated the 2nd May, 2012 and was last amended by notification No. 76/2012-Customs (N.T.), vide number S.O. 1972 (E) dated the 27th August , 2012. -- 1 of 1 --
